What We Offer

Advisory Services

End-to-end real estate advisory with personal oversight on every transaction.

01

Residential Plots & Homes

Buying residential plots, flats, and built-up houses across Mohali, New Chandigarh, and Panchkula.

02

Commercial Showroom Advisory

High-footfall commercial showroom plots on arterial roads in Mohali IT City, Aerocity, and JLPL corridors.

03

To-Let & Rental Services

Helping property owners find verified tenants and tenants find the right space across Tricity.

04

NRI Investment Advisory

Specialized advisory for NRIs with power of attorney support and remote transaction management.

Inder Thakral

Principal Advisor · 15+ Years

The Principal Advisor

Personal Service.
Verified Results.

Inder Thakral is an independent real estate advisory serving the Chandigarh Tricity. Every transaction is personally overseen, every title is carefully verified.

The firm provides trusted guidance for buying, selling, leasing, and investing — with a simple promise: never show a property that would not be recommended to family.

Learn More →

Our Philosophy

"I will never show you a property I would not recommend to my own family. Your investment is our responsibility."

— Inder Thakral
